requirement.title: parseInteger Primitive
requirement.description: Expose parseInteger(input) that returns an integer when input is a numeric string, otherwise null. No exceptions; null signals "not parseable".

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Given input "42", parseInteger MUST return the number 42. REQ-001
Given input "abc", parseInteger MUST return null (no throw). REQ-001

requirement.title: parseFloat Primitive
requirement.description: Expose parseFloat(input) that returns a finite number when input is a numeric string (including decimals), otherwise null. Independent of parseInteger — must not depend on parser/int.js.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Given input "3.14", parseFloat MUST return the number 3.14. REQ-002
Given input "NaN" or non-numeric, parseFloat MUST return null. REQ-002

requirement.title: formatNumber Primitive
requirement.description: Expose formatNumber(n) that returns a string representation of n with a leading "#" prefix (e.g., formatNumber(42) === "#42"). Null-safe: formatNumber(null) returns "#null".

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Given number 42, formatNumber MUST return the string "#42". REQ-003
Given null, formatNumber MUST return the string "#null". REQ-003

requirement.title: formatList Uses formatNumber
requirement.description: Expose formatList(arr) that joins formatNumber results with ", ". Depends on fr-formatter-001: MUST import and call formatNumber rather than reimplementing the "#" prefix logic.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Given [], formatList MUST return the empty string "". REQ-004

requirement.title: roundTrip Pipeline
requirement.description: Expose roundTrip(input) that parses input as an integer, falling back to float, then formats the result via formatNumber. Integrates both parser and formatter epics.

requirement.title: CLI Entry Exposing roundTrip
requirement.description: Expose src/cli.js such that `node src/cli.js <arg>` prints the roundTrip result followed by a newline.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Running `node src/cli.js 42` MUST print "#42\n" to stdout. REQ-006
